name: classdesk
description: ClassDesk monorepo - generic open-source AI assistant template

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:shell
scripts.lint:check: npm run lint:js:check && npm run lint:shell:check
scripts.format: npm run format:js && npm run format:sql && npm run format:shell && npm run format:md
scripts.format:check: npm run format:js:check && npm run format:sql:check && npm run format:shell:check && npm run format:md:check
scripts.format:sql: git ls-files '*.sql' | xargs -I {} npx sql-formatter --fix -l postgresql {}
scripts.format:sql:check: git ls-files '*.sql' | xargs -I {} npx sql-formatter -l postgresql {}
